---
title: "Setup Check"
---

Please run the following code before the workshop.

```r
sessionInfo()
```

## Package installation

```r
required_packages <- c(
  "tidyverse", "dampack", "heemod", "hesim", "BCEA",
  "flexsurv", "here", "knitr", "rmarkdown"
)

installed <- rownames(installed.packages())
missing <- setdiff(required_packages, installed)

if (length(missing) > 0) {
  install.packages(missing)
}
```

## Package loading check

```r
library(tidyverse)
library(dampack)
library(heemod)
library(hesim)
library(BCEA)
library(flexsurv)
```

If any package fails to install or load, please contact the workshop team before June 25.
